case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $718.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $718.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HAMILTON, RAYNARD
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-18-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
MTN TO STRIKE CLAIM OF RAYNARD HAMILTON FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR SEP-18-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $359.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT RAYNARD HAMILTON. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $359.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION FOR FORFEITURE IN REM FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA SERVED AUG-09-2013, MAIL AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $718.00 U.S. CURRENCY

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF RAYNARD HAMILTON IS DENIED. THE MOTION ASKS THE COURT TO "ENFORCE THE VERIFICATION REQUIREMENT OF CLAIMANT'S INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY." MOTION AT 7. HOWEVER, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS VERIFIED. (EXHIBIT D.) THE MOTION SEEKS TO REQUIRE PLAINTIFF TO STATE THE NATURE OF HIS INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY. HOWEVER, HE HAS DONE SO: "MY WIFE GAVE ME THE MONEY TO HOLD." (EXHIBIT D, PAGE 2.) (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
Mtn To Strike Claim Of Raynard Hamilton
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Strike The Claim Of Raynard Hamilton is denied. The motion asks the Court to "enforce the verification requirement of Claimant's interest in the property." Motion at 7. However, Plaintiff's claim is verified. (Exhibit D.) The motion seeks to require plaintiff to state the nature of his interest in the property. However, he has done so: "My wife gave me the money to hold." (Exhibit D, page 2.) (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
